mapper.select: SELECT id, shop_lat, shop_lng, delivery_radius_km, delivery_min_amount, delivery_fee_type, fixed_delivery_fee, order_time_enabled, order_start_time, order_end_time, qywx_webhook_url_enc, has_qywx_webhook, updated_by, create_time, update_time FROM system_config WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config (shop_lat, shop_lng, delivery_radius_km, delivery_min_amount, delivery_fee_type, fixed_delivery_fee, order_time_enabled, order_start_time, order_end_time, qywx_webhook_url_enc, has_qywx_webhook, updated_by) VALUES (#{shopLat}, #{shopLng}, #{deliveryRadiusKm}, #{deliveryMinAmount}, #{deliveryFeeType}, #{fixedDeliveryFee}, #{orderTimeEnabled}, #{orderStartTime}, #{orderEndTime}, #{qywxWebhookUrlEnc}, #{hasQywxWebhook}, #{updatedBy})
